authority.uiux_baseline_docx: AI_Agent_Workflow工作台_UIUX详细设计规范与需求规格说明书_v1.1_新增Workflow编排.docx

guardrails: This checklist refreshes FR-018 after high-risk HITL review context evidence; it does not claim A4 acceptance.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
W1.5.207 changes no accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, IPC, renderer storage, packaging, updater, or baseline docx content.
Evidence must remain metadata-only and must not retain raw prompt, model output, uploaded-file bytes, response body, custom_value content, secure path, cache path, or output directory values.

design_principles.description: 中央主视图必须是 Workflow Canvas，不再使用流程列表作为主执行视图。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Primary viewport is Canvas-first, with list/table execution views secondary or absent.

design_principles.description: Chat Box 固定在底部，用于自然语言输入；所有 AI 输出显示进入流式输出面板。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Chat input and AI output surfaces are visually and semantically separated.

design_principles.description: 流式输出面板默认折叠，位于 Chat Box 上方；用户需要时展开查看。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Stream details remain progressive and do not overload the first viewport.

design_principles.description: 右侧 Task 详情面板默认隐藏，点击节点后自动显示并绑定当前节点。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Node selection drives the right-side Task context without manual lookup.

design_principles.description: 文件树保留入口，但默认折叠隐藏，不抢占主视图。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Project files remain available without competing with the Canvas.

design_principles.description: 执行模式切换必须放在主执行按钮附近，可随时调整。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Run mode is visible and adjustable at the execution control point.

design_principles.description: 所有复杂信息采用渐进呈现，避免用户迷失。
design_principles.acceptance_focus: Dense details use Drawer, collapse, disclosure, or focused drill-down patterns.

non_functional_ui_requirements.description: Canvas 100 个节点以内操作应保持流畅；节点拖拽、选择反馈应小于 100ms。
StreamEvent 到达后 UI 更新延迟建议小于 200ms。
执行过程中断后，重新打开项目可恢复 Workflow、节点状态、最近产物与快照。
参考资料和项目文件默认本地保存；敏感资料不得未经授权发送到云端模型。
关键按钮具备文本标签；颜色状态需有文字辅助；支持键盘导航基础能力。
Windows、macOS、Linux 桌面端应尽量保持一致布局。
Canvas 节点类型、Skill、模型路由和工具调用应插件化。
所有执行动作、工具调用、错误和产物变更必须可追踪。

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须提供跨平台桌面应用 Shell，包含窗口区域与菜单栏。
acceptance_checks: Electron app opens a desktop window with the workbench as the first screen.
Application menu bar exists for file/edit/view/window/help level commands.
Windows, macOS, and Linux launch evidence is captured before Phase 1 exit.
current_evidence: W1.5.80 established real Electron BrowserWindow and preload/window wiring.
W1.5 visual smoke exercises the workbench shell inside Electron.
remaining_gap: Desktop menu bar acceptance is not recorded.
Cross-platform packaged launch evidence is blocked by packaging dependency gates.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须提供可折叠左侧 Dock，包含所有一级模块入口。
acceptance_checks: Left Dock is present in the first viewport.
Dock collapse and restore are keyboard and pointer accessible.
All first-level module entries required by M1.5 are reachable.
current_evidence: W1.5.89 introduced the shell chrome and left Dock scaffold.
Visual smoke checks the Dock surface presence.
remaining_gap: Complete first-level module coverage has not been accepted by A4.
Dock collapse behavior is not recorded as a formal FR acceptance item.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须保留文件树入口，默认隐藏，点击后打开文件树 Drawer。
acceptance_checks: File Tree entry remains available from the Dock or equivalent shell control.
File Tree content is hidden by default and opens through a Drawer interaction.
The Drawer displays the real project file structure, not only local fixture data.
current_evidence: W1.5.92 added a read-only File Tree scaffold.
W1.5.105 added local file tree selection details.
remaining_gap: Real filesystem enumeration and project-backed file open actions are not implemented.
Default-hidden Drawer behavior has not been accepted as an A4 UX path.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须以 Node Canvas 显示 Workflow，并支持分支、并行与反馈回路。
acceptance_checks: Canvas is the central primary view.
Nodes and edges represent a real WorkflowGraph with branch, parallel, and feedback-loop topology.
Canvas rendering uses the approved implementation path after the React Flow dependency gate.
current_evidence: W1.5.94-W1.5.104 provide a focused read-only Canvas scaffold and local navigation evidence.
remaining_gap: @xyflow/react is not approved or installed.
Real React Flow Canvas, drag/connect/edit behavior, and graph persistence remain outside current evidence.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 用户点击节点后，节点高亮且右侧详情面板自动打开。
acceptance_checks: Pointer selection highlights the selected node.
Keyboard selection path has equivalent focus evidence.
Right Task details open automatically and bind to the selected node.
current_evidence: W1.5.96-W1.5.104 cover local Canvas node selection, traversal, history, summary, and type focus evidence.
remaining_gap: Selection is still local scaffold behavior rather than accepted React Flow behavior.
Automatic right-side Task binding has not been accepted end to end.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: Task 详情必须展示节点名称、状态、输入、输出、审查规则、Skill、模型、产物。
acceptance_checks: Task Drawer opens on node selection.
Task details include node name, status, inputs, outputs, review rules, Skill, model, and artifacts.
Details are project-backed and update as runtime state changes.
current_evidence: W1.5.90 added Task Drawer collapse behavior.
W1.5.107 added local Task Drawer selection details.
remaining_gap: Full field coverage for inputs, outputs, review rules, Skill, model, and artifacts is not accepted.
Runtime-backed detail updates are not implemented.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须支持单步、半自动、自动三种模式，并放在执行按钮旁边。
acceptance_checks: Step, semi-auto, and auto modes are visible near the primary execution button.
Mode changes are persisted or applied to the active Workflow execution policy.
Single-node run-once behavior is reachable for step mode.
current_evidence: WorkflowGraph schema defines mode values step, semi_auto, and auto.
HTTP API includes a run-once node endpoint for step-mode semantics.
W1.5.180 added desktop execution mode controls and a step-mode run-once dispatch surface through the Runtime Workbench.
remaining_gap: Backend run-once execution success has not been proven end-to-end from the desktop workbench.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for execution mode placement and behavior is not recorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须提供固定底部 Chat Box，支持针对当前节点或全局 Workflow 输入指令。
acceptance_checks: Chat Box is fixed at the bottom of the workbench.
User can choose current-node versus global Workflow intent.
Submitted instructions route to real runtime command handling without leaking raw prompt text into unsafe evidence.
current_evidence: W1.5.108-W1.5.112 added local draft, intent, preview, and send guard.
W1.5.150-W1.5.169 added metadata-only local send/history/focus and visual smoke matrix evidence.
W1.5.195 added runtime submit-instruction handlers, metadata-only command projection, renderer dispatch, and runtime/session tests.
W1.5.196 added Workflow/Current node scope controls, strict selected-or-active node targeting, and no-current-node fallback regression coverage.
remaining_gap: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the runtime-backed current-node/global Workflow Chat instruction path is not recorded.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain outside this evidence refresh and must not be inferred from local receipt metadata.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须提供默认折叠的流式输出面板。
acceptance_checks: Stream panel is located above the Chat Box.
Stream panel defaults to a collapsed state without hiding critical status.
Collapsed state preserves unread and summary affordances.
current_evidence: W1.5.113-W1.5.118 cover stream panel collapse, group collapse, selection collapse, controls collapse, and selected metadata behavior.
remaining_gap: A4 has not yet accepted the first-viewport default collapsed layout.
Phase-level UI recording is still missing.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须支持展开显示思考摘要、工具调用、阶段结果和 AI 回复。
acceptance_checks: Expanded Stream panel shows thought summary, tool calls, phase results, and AI reply classes distinctly.
Unknown event types degrade safely without exposing raw payload.
Expanded content remains readable on desktop and mobile visual smoke routes.
current_evidence: W1.5.119-W1.5.149 cover stream event details, content fallback, unknown event handling, and visual smoke matrix hardening.
remaining_gap: A4 has not yet accepted the full expanded event taxonomy as an end-user UX path.
Phase-level demo with real workflow stream remains missing.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须支持工作台模式项目初始化，输入任务背景并上传参考资料。
acceptance_checks: Workbench project creation flow collects task background.
Reference upload/import is available during project initialization.
Created project opens into the desktop workbench with runtime connection metadata.
current_evidence: Runtime project initialization APIs and harness structures exist from M1.3 work.
W1.5.181 added desktop project creation dispatch with task-background local UI state and strict runtime request validation.

W1.5.201 added a combined desktop project creation plus initial reference import command path that creates the project, verifies mandatory Git evidence, then imports the initial reference through the runtime references endpoint without rendering raw file content.
remaining_gap: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the full new-project path is not recorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 每个工作台项目必须默认初始化 Git 仓库，不允许用户取消。
acceptance_checks: Project creation initializes Git by default.
The user cannot bypass Git initialization in the workbench flow.
Initial commit/tag behavior matches runtime_harness.md.
current_evidence: runtime_harness.md and M1.3 project initialization work define Git initialization behavior.
W1.5.181 requires desktop project creation success to include git_initialized=true and a non-empty first_commit_sha.
remaining_gap: A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit/tag behavior is not recorded.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the mandatory Git path is not recorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须支持导入、启用、禁用、查看项目参考资料。
acceptance_checks: References can be imported into the project.
References can be enabled and disabled without deleting source files.
Reference content and metadata can be viewed from the workbench.
current_evidence: W1.5.182 added runtime-backed reference import, list, enable, disable, and view surfaces with safe desktop projection.
Runtime reference manifest updates are guarded by the project Git lock boundary.
remaining_gap: A4 UX acceptance evidence for reference import, enable, disable, and view user paths is not recorded.
Delete semantics remain intentionally out of scope until accepted spec material defines them.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须支持启用 Skill、查看候选 Skill 与 Skill 配置。
acceptance_checks: Candidate Skills are discoverable from the workbench.
Skills can be enabled or disabled per project.
Skill configuration is viewable without exposing secrets.
current_evidence: M1.4 project config and skills API work exposes runtime-side Skill information.
W1.5.183 added safe desktop Skill list, enable, disable, and version surfaces without returning persisted params.
W1.5.202 adds runtime-backed Skill candidate discovery plus secret-safe MCP configuration metadata display without retaining params, command_or_url, or secret_ref values.
remaining_gap: A4 UX acceptance evidence for secret-safe Skill configuration display is not recorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须支持自动快照、查看时间线、恢复到此处、继续执行。
acceptance_checks: Version timeline is visible in the workbench.
Automatic snapshots are created at required workflow boundaries.
Restore and continue execution actions work against project state.
current_evidence: W1.5.93 introduced the Version Snapshot scaffold.
W1.5.106 added local Version Snapshot selection details.
W1.5.185 added explicit create-only workflow snapshot dispatch for POST /workflows/{workflow_id}/snapshot.
W1.3.7 records runtime git snapshots for run.started, attempt.completed, and terminal run events.
W1.5.203 registers the accepted runtime POST /workflows/{workflow_id}/snapshot endpoint and records explicit workflow snapshots in snapshots/snapshots.jsonl.
W1.5.204 registers the accepted runtime GET /workflows/{workflow_id}/history endpoint and lets Desktop refresh a metadata-only Version Snapshot timeline from workflow_history.json.
remaining_gap: Desktop workflow_history timeline is visible, but automatic and explicit snapshot ledger entries from snapshots/snapshots.jsonl are not yet surfaced as live project state.
Restore-to-snapshot and continue execution remain unimplemented because no accepted restore contract exists.
Git-backed restore semantics and A4 UX acceptance evidence remain unrecorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须区分展示工具调用、阶段结果、AI 回复等事件类型。
acceptance_checks: Tool call, phase result, and AI reply events have distinct labels and grouping.
Event classification follows stream_event.md categories and event types.
Unknown events remain visible but clearly marked as unknown.
current_evidence: W1.5.121-W1.5.131 cover StreamEvent phase, context ids, provenance, classification, identity display, payload summary, markdown restrictions, fallback, and unknown event ingestion.
remaining_gap: A4 has not accepted final user-facing labels for every event class.
Phase-level demo stream evidence remains missing.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统必须将节点生成的产物记录并在详情面板中展示。
acceptance_checks: Runtime-generated artifacts are recorded with node association.
Task details show artifact references for the selected node.
Artifact open/download behavior is safe and project-scoped.
current_evidence: W1.5.120 added Stream panel artifact ref display evidence.
runtime_harness.md defines artifacts and outputs directories.
W1.5.195 added Desktop preload/main native artifact open/download handoff, renderer action wiring, metadata-only ArtifactActionResult snapshots, and sensitive export blocking tests.
W1.5.199 added selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail display, node-bound artifact action dispatch, and metadata-only command tests.
remaining_gap: A4 UX acceptance evidence for node artifact detail display and safe open/download behavior is not recorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 半自动模式下，审查节点或高风险节点必须能暂停等待用户确认。
acceptance_checks: Semi-auto mode pauses at review or high-risk nodes.
Human confirmation UI clearly shows the pending decision and safe actions.
Resume path is recorded and reflected in runtime state.
current_evidence: M1.3 and M1.4 HITL/resumption and approval bridge work exists on the runtime side.
W1.5.184 added a desktop human decision submit surface for semi-auto HITL decisions.

W1.5.206 added runtime run discovery, sanitized pending human decision projection, and a Desktop refresh-pending command that populates the HITL form without retaining raw prompt or custom_value content.
W1.5.207 adds high-risk HITL review context metadata for review kind, evidence/artifact presence, timeout, decision choices, and labels without retaining prompt_to_user or custom_value content.
remaining_gap: A4 UX acceptance evidence for high-risk HITL pause/resume behavior is not recorded.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统应支持平移、缩放、适配视图、锁定编辑。
acceptance_checks: Canvas supports pan, zoom, fit view, and edit lock controls.
Controls are accessible by pointer and keyboard where applicable.
100-node interaction performance meets the UIUX non-functional requirement.
current_evidence: Current Canvas is a local read-only scaffold.
remaining_gap: @xyflow/react dependency gate is not approved.
Pan, zoom, fit view, edit lock, and 100-node performance evidence are missing.

fr_acceptance_items.requirement: 系统应支持常用快捷键。
acceptance_checks: Common shortcuts are defined in a user-visible command map.
Keyboard handlers do not conflict with text input editing.
Shortcut behavior is covered by React tests and visual smoke where applicable.
current_evidence: W1.5.72-W1.5.78 established runtime workbench shortcut routing and DOM keyboard binding.
W1.5.158-W1.5.169 added Chat Box keyboard/focus visual smoke matrix evidence.
remaining_gap: A formal common-shortcut acceptance list is not recorded.
User-facing command discoverability is not implemented.

acceptance_summary.phase_exit_claim: EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready; A4 acceptance has not been recorded for every FR item.

next_recommended_slices.title: A4 runtime-flow reviewer decision recording
next_recommended_slices.reason: Record A4 reviewer decisions for the 11 pending review inputs; keep FR-015 restore implementation blocked until ADR-0012 or another accepted contract is available.
